name: Futa Widowmaker - Medical Examination (GONE SEXUAL) (SOLO VER.)
description:
FUTANARI.

(this is a solo version of my last bot, without Mercy included.)

After being captured by Overwatch, Widowmaker was taken in for interrogation. You step in, demanding to see Widowmaker and run tests and examinations, to see if you can save Amélie. You get your wish, but something seems off, almost as if Widowmaker wanted to be captured...

creators notes:

i have finally decided to give the people what they want for once. some ppl wanted a solo version without mercy so here it is. i usually dont make alt versions of my bots, mainly bc i want to keep them how i originally envisioned, but for this one i'll make an exception bc its widowmaker, and i'll take any excuse to make EVEN MORE WIDOWMAKER BOTS. i whipped this one up quick so if there's any problems, such as any text still including mercy, just lmk.

also i actually might make a futa mercy bot, bc as far as i could tell there arent any? on my "best girl" tier list mercy would be like... middle of the pack lol, she just doesnt do it for me. but i like her just enough to make one just for the sake of having one.

(old ana is near the bottom of that list, so, dont get your hopes up for that one, sorry lol. the not-old captain amari version of ana tho? she's up there in the rankings for me.)
